ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protein_structures" (
  "struct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein structure */,
  "pdb_id" TEXT /* PDB ID of the protein structure */,
  "structure_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein structure */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the protein structure */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the protein structure */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author or research team of the protein structure */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication or submission */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the protein is derived */,
  "protein_family" TEXT /* Family of the protein */,
  "ligands" TEXT /* Ligands associated with the protein structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("struct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residues" (
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residue */,
  "struct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure the residue belongs to */,
  "residue_number" INTEGER /* Number of the residue in the protein sequence */,
  "residue_name" TEXT /* Name of the residue (e.g., alanine, glycine) */,
  "chain_id" TEXT /* ID of the chain the residue belongs to */,
  "residue_type" TEXT /* Type of residue (e.g., amino acid, nucleotide) */,
  "secondary_structure" TEXT /* Secondary structure of the residue (e.g., alpha helix, beta sheet) */,
  "coordinate_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the residue in 3D space */,
  "coordinate_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the residue in 3D space */,
  "coordinate_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the residue in 3D space */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residues_struct_id FOREIGN KEY ("struct_id") REFERENCES protein_structures ("struct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperatures" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature measurement */,
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the residue the temperature measurement belongs to */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature of the residue */,
  "max_bb_temperature" REAL /* Maximum backbone temperature of the residue */,
  "max_sc_temperature" REAL /* Maximum side chain temperature of the residue */,
  "avg_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the residue */,
  "avg_bb_temperature" REAL /* Average backbone temperature of the residue */,
  "avg_sc_temperature" REAL /* Average side chain temperature of the residue */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature of the residue */,
  "min_bb_temperature" REAL /* Minimum backbone temperature of the residue */,
  "min_sc_temperature" REAL /* Minimum side chain temperature of the residue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperatures_residue_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupancies" (
  "occupancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupancy measurement */,
  "residue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the residue the occupancy measurement belongs to */,
  "min_occupancy" REAL /* Minimum occupancy of the residue */,
  "min_bb_occupancy" REAL /* Minimum backbone occupancy of the residue */,
  "min_sc_occupancy" REAL /* Minimum side chain occupancy of the residue */,
  "avg_occupancy" REAL /* Average occupancy of the residue */,
  "avg_bb_occupancy" REAL /* Average backbone occupancy of the residue */,
  "avg_sc_occupancy" REAL /* Average side chain occupancy of the residue */,
  "max_occupancy" REAL /* Maximum occupancy of the residue */,
  "max_bb_occupancy" REAL /* Maximum backbone occupancy of the residue */,
  "max_sc_occupancy" REAL /* Maximum side chain occupancy of the residue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancies_residue_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chains" (
  "chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chain */,
  "struct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure the chain belongs to */,
  "chain_name" TEXT /* Name of the chain (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "chain_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of residues in the chain */,
  "chain_length" INTEGER /* Length of the chain */,
  "chain_type" TEXT /* Type of chain (e.g., alpha, beta) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residue_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "residue1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first residue in the interaction */,
  "residue2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second residue in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., hydrogen bond, salt bridge) */,
  "interaction_strength" REAL /* Strength of the interaction */,
  "interaction_distance" REAL /* Distance between the interacting residues */,
  "interaction_angle" REAL /* Angle between the interacting residues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_interactions_residue2_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue2_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residue_interactions_residue1_id FOREIGN KEY ("residue1_id") REFERENCES residues ("residue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structural_similarities" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity */,
  "struct1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first protein structure in the similarity */,
  "struct2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second protein structure in the similarity */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Score representing the degree of similarity */,
  "alignment_method" TEXT /* Method used for alignment */,
  "alignment_score" REAL /* Score of the alignment */,
  "alignment_length" INTEGER /* Length of the aligned regions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structural_similarities_struct2_id FOREIGN KEY ("struct2_id") REFERENCES protein_structures ("struct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structural_similarities_struct1_id FOREIGN KEY ("struct1_id") REFERENCES protein_structures ("struct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
